task_completion.description: Verify that a category named 'Canvas Bags' has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Canvas Bags' category is visible in the Categories window or in a category dropdown menu within the POS interface.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Small variants (Natural and Black) were added with correct details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The items list shows 'PCT-S-NAT' and 'PCT-S-BLK' with a retail price of $18.99 and stock quantity of 25.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Medium variants (Natural and Black) were added with correct details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The items list shows 'PCT-M-NAT' and 'PCT-M-BLK' with a retail price of $24.99 and stock quantity of 30.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Large variants (Natural and Black) were added with correct details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The items list shows 'PCT-L-NAT' and 'PCT-L-BLK' with a retail price of $32.99 and stock quantity of 20.

task_completion.description: Verify that the XLarge variants (Natural and Black) were added with correct details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The items list shows 'PCT-XL-NAT' and 'PCT-XL-BLK' with a retail price of $39.99 and stock quantity of 15.

task_completion.description: Verify that the new variants are assigned to the 'Canvas Bags' category.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The items list displays 'Canvas Bags' in the Category column for the new PCT- items, or it is selected in the item properties window.

task_completion.description: Verify that the items are marked as Taxable.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Taxable' checkbox is checked in the item properties window for the variants, or a tax column in the items list indicates they are taxable.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the NCH Copper POS graphical interface to add the items.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Copper POS application windows (e.g., 'Item List', 'Item Properties') being interacted with.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not just type the answers into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The data is entered into the actual POS software, not a text file or terminal.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not directly edit the products.csv file in a spreadsheet or text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no screenshots of a CSV file being edited; all data entry is done through the POS GUI.

privileged_info_for_vlm:
The task requires adding 8 product variants of a Premium Canvas Tote bag to a new 'Canvas Bags' category in NCH Copper POS. The variants are:
1-2. Small (Natural/Black): SKUs PCT-S-NAT / PCT-S-BLK, Retail $18.99, Cost $8.50, Stock 25.
3-4. Medium (Natural/Black): SKUs PCT-M-NAT / PCT-M-BLK, Retail $24.99, Cost $11.00, Stock 30.
5-6. Large (Natural/Black): SKUs PCT-L-NAT / PCT-L-BLK, Retail $32.99, Cost $14.50, Stock 20.
7-8. XLarge (Natural/Black): SKUs PCT-XL-NAT / PCT-XL-BLK, Retail $39.99, Cost $17.00, Stock 15.
All items must be marked as Taxable and assigned to the 'Canvas Bags' category.
